title: Introduction to Scoreboards
description: Learn to track player stats and create games

content.text:
Scoreboards

Scoreboards track player statistics and can be used to create games and competitions.

Creating a Scoreboard:

  • Use /scoreboard objectives add
  • Choose a name for your objective
  • Select a criteria (health, kills, etc.)
  • Set a display name

Common Criteria:

  • health - Player health
  • playerKillCount - Player kills
  • deathCount - Player deaths
  • dummy - Custom values

Scoreboard Commands:

  • /scoreboard players set - Set a score
  • /scoreboard players add - Add to a score
  • /scoreboard players remove - Remove from a score
  • /scoreboard objectives setdisplay - Display scores

Example:

/scoreboard objectives add points dummy Points
/scoreboard objectives setdisplay sidebar points
/scoreboard players set @s points 10
content.task: Create a scoreboard for tracking points and set your score to 10.
